name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Unlight Extant
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Chaos Spell Skill Gems
Chaos Skills inflict up to 15 Withered Debuffs on Hit for 5 seconds
Cannot Inflict Wither on targets that are not on Full Life
flavourText: Beyond the edge of existence, there
shines violet, naught but pain...
one lantern carries a single flame.

name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon have 109% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +16% to Quality of Supported Skill Gems

name: Sorrow Shroud
implicitMods: 14% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Acceleration Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

very life. There has to be a way to save our people. If we
must, let us tear apart the very foundations of reality!"

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy

51% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
